name: Ocean Power Technologies, Inc.
business: Ocean Power Technologies, Inc. (OPTT) specializes in Maritime Domain Awareness (MDA) solutions, including Data as a Service (DaaS), Robotics as a Service (RaaS), and Power as a Service (PaaS), using platforms such as the PowerBuoy, WAM-V autonomous vessel, and Merrows command and control system. The company designs, manufactures, deploys, and operates these systems for defense, security, subsea infrastructure, offshore oil and gas, offshore energy, marine research, and communication markets. Customers include U.S. and allied defense agencies, offshore energy operators, and commercial interests.

exposures.sentence: Edge Processing: Utilizes onboard AI and machine learning to analyze data locally, prioritize key findings, and reduce transmission loads.
We design, manufacture, deploy, and operate these systems for defense, security, subsea infrastructure, offshore oil and gas, offshore energy, marine research, and communication markets.
The PowerBuoy delivers autonomous, renewable energy via OPT-managed infrastructure.

The PowerBuoy converts any combination of wave motion, solar, and wind into energy and includes onboard energy storage to maintain system availability during low-sea-state, cloudy, or still conditions.
Our Autonomous Vehicles business centers around our patented WAM-V (Wave Adaptive Modular Vessel) platform a class of modular USVs engineered to support autonomous maritime operations.

The system combines high-definition radar, optical and thermal imaging, and vessel Automatic Identification System (AIS) modules with edge processing, secure communications, and cloud-based analytics.
RF and Satellite Relay: Transmit compressed data from surface nodes to command centers via satellite or terrestrial links.
Security for offshore oil and gas platforms, wind farms, desalination plants, and seaports.

catalysts.event: Delivery of AI-enabled PowerBuoy to Middle East customer
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we delivered a PowerBuoy platform integrated with AI-enabled Merrows software to a customer in the Middle East.

catalysts.event: Demonstration of multi-day over-the-horizon WAM-V operations in Indo-Pacific
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we conducted a successful demonstration of multi-day over-the-horizon (OTH) WAM-V operations in the Indo-Pacific region.

catalysts.event: Participation in U.S. Navy Project Overmatch
catalysts.sentence: In October 2024, we completed a phase of the U.S. Navy's Project Overmatch initiative by participating in the Mission Autonomy Proving Grounds exercises.
In June 2024, we executed an Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) agreement with Teledyne Marine.
In June 2024, we launched a 24/7 global customer support capability for deployed platforms and service contracts.

catalysts.event: Appointment of RIG as exclusive distributor in UAE
catalysts.sentence: In October 2024, OPT appointed RIG as its exclusive distributor for defense and security solutions within the United Arab Emirates.

catalysts.event: Strategic partnership with Unique Group for WAM-V deployments in GCC
catalysts.sentence: Announced in July 2024, this collaboration focuses on deploying OPT's WAM-V USVs across the United Arab Emirates and other Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) countries for commercial customers primarily active in the offshore energy industry.

catalysts.event: Strategic partnership with Elektron SAS with $4M purchase commitment
catalysts.sentence: Announced in April 2025, this collaboration includes a $4 million purchase commitment for OPT's suite of intelligent maritime technologies, encompassing the WAM-V USVs, the PowerBuoy, and the AI-powered Merrows platform.

catalysts.event: Strategic partnership with Ocean Wave Solutions as Brazil distributor
catalysts.sentence: During the third quarter of fiscal 2025 we established a strategic partnership with Ocean Wave Solutions Ltda (OWS), a Brazil-based company, to serve as its authorized distributor in the Brazilian market.

catalysts.event: Strategic alliance with Red Cat Holdings
catalysts.sentence: In April 2024, OPT entered a strategic alliance with Red Cat Holdings, Inc., a U.S.-based provider of drone technologies for defense and commercial applications.

catalysts.event: Contract with international defense agency for WAM-Vs
catalysts.sentence: Also in May 2025, OPT entered into a contract with an international defense agency to supply multiple WAM-V USVs.

catalysts.event: Purchase orders totaling $5M from Latin American customers
catalysts.sentence: Between December 2024 and January 2025, we received purchase orders totaling approximately $5 million for PowerBuoy and WAM-V platforms from customers in Latin America.

catalysts.event: Contract from Naval Postgraduate School for PowerBuoy deployment
catalysts.sentence: In September 2024, we were awarded a contract from the U.S. Naval Postgraduate School to deploy a PowerBuoy equipped with the Merrows system in Monterey Bay, California.
In July 2025 we were awarded ISO 9001 certification.

On December 20, 2024, the Company entered into a securities purchase agreement (the Securities Purchase Agreement ) with an institutional investor (the Investor ) under which the Company agreed to issue and sell, in one or more registered public offerings by the Company directly to the Investor (the Offering ), senior convertible notes for up to an aggregate principal amount of $54.0 million
In May 2025 we issued $10 million in aggregate principal amount of convertible notes with a 24-month maturity to new institutional investors with net proceeds of $9.7 million.
